title: Onboarding - Animations
scenario: Verify animations are functional on all onboarding screens including initial setup loading screens and the 'Well hello, first thing first...', 'Up-to-Date', 'Personal', and 'Organized' screens.
steps: Launch the application and observe the initial setup loading screen for any animations.
Proceed to the 'Well hello, first thing first...' screen and verify all animations are playing correctly.
Navigate to the 'Up-to-Date' screen and check that animations are functional.
Move to the 'Personal' screen and confirm animations are working as expected.
Advance to the 'Organized' screen and ensure all animations are displayed properly.
expected: All onboarding screens display smooth, functional animations without any glitches or freezes.
